top_clusters.evidence: /tjanster/sup-yoga is the #1 traffic source (12 of 31 clicks, 39%). Query 'sup yoga stockholm' ranks pos 9.8 with 10.5% CTR.
Query 'möhippa dalarna' converts at 16.7% CTR pos 9.0. /blogg/mohippa-dalarna-aktiviteter has 16.2% CTR at pos 9.0.
Massive impression volume on 'teambuilding' queries but stuck at pos 40+. /blogg/teambuilding-aktiviteter-stockholm has 407 imp on its own. Long way from clicks.
top_clusters.action: Push internal-link weight to teambuilding posts; rewrite titles for higher CTR once ranking improves

best_title_formats.ctr_evidence: Confirmed: foretagsyoga blog (now retitled) and mohippa-dalarna-aktiviteter (16.2% CTR) both lead with pris/cost framing.
möhippa dalarna 16.7% CTR — short geo + topic queries convert.

keywords_to_double_down.reason: Top click driver; supporting blogs needed
Pos 9 + 16.7% CTR — keep feeding this cluster

optimization_results.hypothesis: Shorter price-led title should lift CTR from 1% toward 2–3% over the next 28 days.

before.title: Företagsyoga i Stockholm: priser, upplägg och vad som faktiskt ingår

optimization_results.hypothesis: Question + year pattern is the highest-CTR format. Aiming for 5–8% CTR over next 28 days.

key_insights: PRICE + YEAR is the confirmed-winner title pattern for this site. Apply to all commercial blog posts where price is a key buying factor.
SHORT TITLES win: keep seoTitle under 60 chars (the suffix '| Yoga med Camilla' eats 18 chars).
SUP YOGA is the lead service. Build content around it. Already 39% of traffic from one page.
GEO-SPECIFIC long-tail (möhippa dalarna, möhippa rättvik) ranks fast and converts at >10% CTR.
TEAMBUILDING impressions are huge but the site doesn't rank top 20 yet. Don't burn time on CTR rewrites until position improves into the top 20.
